spec_status.highlight: FCR spec PR in final review; Gloas support deferred to follow-up PR
FFG conflict check tightened to strict inequality (>1/3 vs ≥1/3)
Restart condition now checks block epoch, not checkpoint epoch
FCR store abstraction separated from main fork choice store
Optimistic sync handling added: won't confirm unvalidated EL blocks

client_updates.highlight: Grandine FCR PR validated end-to-end with Lodestar on devnet
Nimbus v26.3.1 released with FCR enabled by default
Lighthouse and Lodestar have ready-to-go implementations awaiting spec merge
ePBS work prioritized across CL teams; FCR implementations on hold

testing_progress.highlight: Backtesting confirms ~1-month mainnet analysis matches PR performance estimates

organizational.highlight: Client implementer approvals needed to merge FCR spec PR
Gloas-compatible FCR requires fork choice abstraction changes first

action_items.action: Review and approve FCR spec PR #4747
Provide feedback on FCR technical paper

targets.target: ePBS devnet-2 launch targeted for next week
